[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11111000 5
1 10110001 4
2 00101100 3
3 00110101 4
4 00101010 3
5 01111011 6
6 01011000 3
7 10110001 4

01 10 10110000 3
12 21 10110000 3
23 32 00100000 1
34 43 00100100 2
45 54 00100000 1
56 65 00101010 3 match 4
67 76 01011000 3 match 6
70 07 00010000 1

02 20 10110001 4 match 1 7
13 31 00101000 2
24 42 00110001 3
35 53 00101000 2
46 64 00110001 3
57 75 00001000 1
60 06 00110001 3
71 17 01011000 3 match 6

14 41 00110000 2

36 63 00101000 2
47 74 00010000 1
50 05 00100000 1
61 16 01111000 4
72 27 00010000 1

26 62 00110001 3
37 73 00001000 1
